artifact: Lists distinct race years for circuits whose location is Shanghai.
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.year
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r."circuitId" = c.circuitid
WHERE c.location = 'Shanghai'
ORDER BY r.year;

raw_response.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.year
FROM races r
JOIN circuits c ON r."circuitId" = c.circuitid
WHERE c.location = 'Shanghai'
ORDER BY r.year;
raw_response.artifact: Lists distinct race years for circuits whose location is Shanghai.
